presets.label: ALTTP runtime test side by side
ALTTP runtime complete side by side

notes: The initial repo-owned preset is deliberately minimal and only freezes explicit defaults extracted from upstream sources.
Additional presets should prefer separate files over embedding large option blobs directly in this manifest.
Runtime-facing presets belong here when they stabilize the linkedworld contract without inventing new gameplay logic.
The side-by-side runtime presets also act as the canonical pointer layer toward normalized tracker and metadata mappings.
